title: actinoschoenus yunnanensis
intro: Actinoschoenus yunnanensis is a type of plant species, specifically a type of sedge, that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. Actinoschoenus yunnanensis has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and to reduce fever. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits.
